violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of the new ice machine were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Dishwasher must be serviced, and 3 bay sink to be used until dishwasher is sanitizing properly. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Ice buckets are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on the shelves behind curtains at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
The ceiling above the bar area is in poor repair, with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The outside area along the building and door has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, vegetation, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
